findings.title: Upward layer import: futures.py → directory.py
findings.description: sanic/models/futures.py:5 — data/infrastructure layer imports from presentation/API layer. Expected direction: presentation → service → data.
findings.fix: Verschiebe directory.py-Logik in eine Service-Schicht oder Abstraktions-Interface, das von futures.py importiert werden darf.

findings.title: Circular dependency (11 modules)
findings.description: Cycle: app.py → http3.py → stream.py → startup.py → base_protocol.py → http_protocol.py → runners.py → impl.py → loader.py → reloader.py → serve.py
findings.fix: Zirkuläre Abhängigkeit (11 Module): app.py → http3.py → stream.py → startup.py → base_protocol.py → http_protocol.py → runners.py → impl.py → loader.py → reloader.py → serve.py. Breche Zyklus durch Interface-Extraktion oder Dependency Inversion.

findings.title: Circular dependency (4 modules)
findings.description: Cycle: exceptions.py → asgi.py → protocol_types.py → connection.py
findings.fix: Zirkuläre Abhängigkeit (4 Module): exceptions.py → asgi.py → protocol_types.py → connection.py. Breche Zyklus durch Interface-Extraktion oder Dependency Inversion.
